tool.name: oob_server
tool.description: Out-of-Band Interaction Server for blind vulnerability detection.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate unique OOB payloads for blind testing - Detect blind SSRF vulnerabilities - Detect blind XSS and XXE - Detect blind command injection - Track payload interactions - DNS and HTTP exfiltration testing

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The OOB action to perform: - generate_payload: Generate unique OOB payload - check_interaction: Check if payload received interaction - list_payloads: List all active payloads - get_url: Get OOB URL for a payload

parameter.name: payload_id
parameter.description: Unique identifier for payload. Required for check_interaction, get_url.

parameter.name: base_domain
parameter.description: Base domain for DNS payloads (default: oob.example.com)

parameter.name: base_url
parameter.description: Base URL for HTTP payloads (default: https://oob.example.com)

parameter.name: vulnerability_type
parameter.description: Type of vulnerability being tested (ssrf, xxe, xss, etc.)

returns.description: OOB payload URLs and interaction status

tool.examples:
# Generate OOB payload
generate_payload oob.attacker.com ssrf
# Check for interaction
check_interaction abc123def
# List all payloads
list_payloads
# Get URL for payload
get_url abc123def
